title: ctenitis canescens
intro: Ctenitis canescens, also known as the pale-veined tree fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis canescens include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Ctenitis canescens typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of ointments or creams.
